name: Malthael
description: A Bruiser who marks his enemies, shredding away high Health enemies.
title: Aspect of Death
info: Once the Aspect of Wisdom, Malthael abandoned heaven after the Worldstone's destruction. In secret, he had resolved to end the Eternal Conflict by becoming a Reaper of Souls and eliminating everything affected by demonic corruption, including humanity.

Malthael.name: Soul Rip
Malthael.description: Extract the souls of nearby enemies afflicted by Reaper's Mark, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and healing Malthael for 25 (+4% per level) per target hit. Heroic targets heal Malthael for an additional 4% of the Hero's maximum Health.

Malthael.name: Wraith Strike
Malthael.description: Instantly teleport through an enemy afflicted by Reaper's Mark, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage and refreshing Reaper's Mark.

Malthael.name: Death Shroud
Malthael.description: After 0.25 seconds, unleash a wave of dark mist that applies Reaper's Mark to enemies it hits.

Malthael.name: Tormented Souls
Malthael.description: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.

Malthael.name: Last Rites
Malthael.description: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.

Malthael.name: Reaper's Mark
Malthael.description: Basic Attacks cleave in an area in front of Malthael and afflict non-Structure targets with Reaper's Mark for 4 seconds. Marked enemies are revealed and take damage equal to 2% of their maximum Health every 1 second.

1.name: On a Pale Horse
1.description: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.

1.name: Fear the Reaper
1.description: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.

4.name: Die Alone
4.description: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.

4.name: Throwing Shade
4.description: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30.  Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.

4.name: Black Harvest
4.description: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of 150 seconds.  Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by 2 seconds.

7.name: Cold Hand
7.description: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Massacre
7.description: Wraith Strike now damages and applies Reaper's Mark to enemies around its target.

7.name: Touch of Death
7.description: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.

10.name: Tormented Souls
10.description: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.

10.name: Last Rites
10.description: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.

13.name: Soul Siphon
13.description: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.

13.name: Ethereal Existence
13.description: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by Reaper's Mark, up to a maximum of 30.

13.name: Inevitable End
13.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.

13.name: Shroud of Wisdom
13.description: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.

16.name: Soul Collector
16.description: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.

16.name: Mortality
16.description: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.

16.name: Memento Mori
16.description: Reaper's Mark deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.

20.name: Reaper of Souls
20.description: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to 6 seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.  If 2 or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.

20.name: Angel of Death
20.description: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.

20.name: Final Curtain
20.description: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying Reaper's Mark to enemies in its area.

20.name: No One Can Stop Death
20.description: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.

tooltipMarkup.MalthaelAngelOfDeath: Last Rites heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Accumulator,MalthaelLastRitesAngelOfDeathHealAccumulator,Ratio/Accumulator,MalthaelLastRitesDamageAccumulator,Ratio)*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelBlackHarvest: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of seconds.Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelColdHand: Soul Rip Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelSoulRipColdHandSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelSoulRipColdHandSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelDeathShroud: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalthaelDeathShroud,CastIntroTime" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, unleash a wave of dark mist that applies <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to enemies it hits.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelDeathsReach: Increase Wraith Strike's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalthaelDeathsReach,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,MalthaelWraithStrike,Range*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelDieAlone: Soul Rip deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelSoulRipDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MalthaelSoulRipDieAloneDamageBonus].Modifier*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelEtherealExistence: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkEtherealExistenceTier1Buff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c>, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,MalthaelReapersMarkEtherealExistenceCasterHasMaxTrackedHeroUnits,Value*Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkEtherealExistenceTier1Buff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelFearTheReaper: Activate to increase Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelFearTheReaperBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> and pass through other units for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelFearTheReaperBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelFinalCurtain: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelDeathShroudFinalCurtainPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,MalthaelDeathShroudFinalCurtainPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, applying <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to enemies in its area.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelInevitableEnd: Activate to become Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelInevitableEndApplyCleanseBuffBehavior,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, but remove all active <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Marks</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelLastRites: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after seconds, deals damage equal to % of their missing Health.Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by seconds, to a minimum of seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelMassacre: Wraith Strike now damages and applies <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to enemies around its target.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelMementoMori: <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkMementoMoriTimer,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelMortality: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelWraithStrikeMortalityDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelNoOneCanStopDeath: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelNoOneCanStopDeathDummyRespawnTimeScale,XP*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelOnAPaleHorse: Gain an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalthaelOnAPaleHorse,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed while mounted.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelReaperOfSouls: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelTormentedSoulsDuration,Duration+Talent,MalthaelReaperOfSouls,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.<n/><n/>If <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,MalthaelReaperOfSoulsProcValidator,AreaArray[0].Count"/></c> or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelReapersMark: Basic Attacks cleave in an area in front of Malthael and afflict non-Structure targets with <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkDebuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Marked enemies are revealed and take damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelReapersMarkDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkDebuff,Period" precision="1" player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelShroudOfWisdom: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelShroudOfWisdomWarning,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelShroudOfWisdomBuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]" player="0" precision="2"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelShroudOfWisdomBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelSoulCollector: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalthaelSoulCollector,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*(-1)" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds and increase its range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Talent,MalthaelSoulCollector,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Effect,MalthaelSoulRipSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius)*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelSoulRip: Extract the souls of nearby enemies afflicted by <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c>, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelSoulRipDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and healing Malthael for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelSoulRipCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> per target hit. Heroic targets heal Malthael for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,MalthaelSoulRipHeroPercentageHealAccumulator,Ratio*100" player="0"/>%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelSoulSiphon: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Accumulator,MalthaelSoulRipHeroPercentageHealAccumulator,Ratio+Accumulator,MalthaelSoulRipSoulSiphonPercentageHealAccumulator,Ratio)*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelThrowingShade: Increase Death Shroud's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalthaelThrowingShade,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Actor,MalthaelDeathShroudGuide,Height*100" player="0"/>%</c>, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MalthaelThrowingShade,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalthaelDeathShroud,Cost.Vital[Energy]" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalthaelDeathShroud,Cost.Vital[Energy]+Talent,MalthaelThrowingShade,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value" precision="2" player="0"/></c>.<n/><n/>Death Shroud's initial impact deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MalthaelDeathShroudThrowingShadeDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelTormentedSouls: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelTormentedSoulsDuration,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelTormentedSoulsInitialModifyWraithStrikeCosts,EffectArray[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelTouchOfDeath: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkTouchOfDeathDebuff,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalthaelReapersMarkTouchOfDeathDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalthaelWraithStrike: Instantly teleport through an enemy afflicted by <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c>, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalthaelWraithStrikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and refreshing <c val="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c>.
